description: This file controls global parameters for game rules and how they work between each difficulty mode. Users cannot add new difficulty modes from this file. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: This is a reference field to define the difficulty mode

columns.name: ResistPenalty
columns.description: Defines the baseline starting point for a player character's resistances for Expansion mode

columns.name: ResistPenaltyNonExpansion
columns.description: Defines the baseline starting point for a player character's resistances for Non-Expansion mode

columns.name: DeathExpPenalty
columns.description: Modifies the percentage of current level experience lost when a player character dies

columns.name: MonsterSkillBonus
columns.description: Adds additional skill levels to skills used by monsters (defined from monstats)

columns.name: MonsterFreezeDivisor
columns.description: Divisor that affects all Freeze Length values on monsters. The attempted Freeze Length value is divided by this divisor to determine the actual Freeze Length.

columns.name: MonsterColdDivisor
columns.description: Divisor that affects all Cold Length values on monsters. The attempted Cold Length value is divided by this divisor to determine the actual Cold Length.

columns.name: AiCurseDivisor
columns.description: Divisor that affects all durations of Curses on monsters. The attempted Curse duration is divided by this divisor to determine the actual Curse duration.

columns.name: LifeStealDivisor
columns.description: Divisor that affects the amount of Life Steal that player characters gain. The attempted Life Steal value is divided by this divisor to determine the actual Life Steal.

columns.name: ManaStealDivisor
columns.description: Divisor that affects the amount of Mana Steal that player characters gain. The attempted Mana Steal value is divided by this divisor to determine the actual Mana Steal.

columns.name: UniqueDamageBonus
columns.description: Percentage modifier for a Unique monster's overall Damage and Attack Rating. This is applied after calculating the monster's other modifications.

columns.name: ChampionDamageBonus
columns.description: Percentage modifier for a Champion monster's overall Damage and Attack Rating. This is applied after calculating the monster's other modifications.

columns.name: PlayerDamagePercentVSPlayer
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a player deals to another player

columns.name: PlayerDamagePercentVSMercenary
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a player deals to another player's mercenary

columns.name: PlayerDamagePercentVSPrimeEvil
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a player deals to a Prime Evil boss

columns.name: PlayerHitReactBufferVSPlayer
columns.description: The frame length for the amount of time a player cannot be placed into another hit react from a player (25 frames = 1 second).

columns.name: PlayerHitReactBufferVSMonster
columns.description: The frame length for the amount of time a player cannot be placed into another hit react from a monster (25 frames = 1 second).

columns.name: MercenaryDamagePercentVSPlayer
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a player's mercenary deals to another player

columns.name: MercenaryDamagePercentVSMercenary
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a player's mercenary deals to another player's mercenary

columns.name: MercenaryDamagePercentVSBoss
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a player's mercenary deals to a boss monster

columns.name: MercenaryMaxStunLength
columns.description: The frame length for the maximum stun length allowed on a player's mercenary (25 Frames = 1 second)

columns.name: PrimeEvilDamagePercentVSPlayer
columns.description: Percentage modifier applied to the total damage a Prime Evil boss deals to a player

columns.name: PrimeEvilDamagePercentVSMercenary
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a Prime Evil boss deals to a player's mercenary

columns.name: PrimeEvilDamagePercentVSPet
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a Prime Evil boss deals to a player's pet

columns.name: PetDamagePercentVSPlayer
columns.description: Percentage modifier for the total damage a player's pet deals to another player

columns.name: MonsterCEDamagePercent
columns.description: Percentage modifier that affects how much damage is dealt to a player by a Monster's version of Corpse Explosion. For example, when certain monsters die and explode on death.

columns.name: MonsterFireEnchantExplosionDamagePercent
columns.description: Percentage modifier that affects how much damage is dealt to a player by a Monster's Fire Enchant explosion. The Fire Enchant death explosion uses the same Corpse Explosion functionality and this value is applied after the .MonsterCEDamagePercent value.

columns.name: StaticFieldMin
columns.description: Percentage modifier for capping the amount of current Life damage dealt to monsters by the Sorceress Static Field skill. This field only affects games in Expansion mode.

columns.name: GambleRare
columns.description: The odds to obtain a Rare item from gambling. The game rolls a random number between 0 to 100000. If that rolled number is less than this value, then the gambled item will be a Rare item.

columns.name: GambleSet
columns.description: The odds to obtain a Set item from gambling. The game rolls a random number between 0 to 100000. If that rolled number is less than this value, then the gambled item will be a Set item.

columns.name: GambleUnique
columns.description: The odds to obtain a Unique item from gambling. The game rolls a random number between 0 to 100000. If that rolled number is less than this value, then the gambled item will be a Unique item.

columns.name: GambleUber
columns.description: The odds to make the gambled item be an Exceptional Quality item. The game rolls a random number between 0 to 10000. This rolled number is then compared to the following formula: ([Item Level] - [Base Item Level]) * [GambleUber] + 1 If the rolled number is less than this value, then the item becomes an Exceptional Quality item, and the game will roll for upgrading it to Elite Quality (See .GambleUltra).

columns.name: GambleUltra
columns.description: The odds to make the gambled item be an Elite Quality item. The game rolls a random number between 0 to 10000. This rolled number is then compared to the following formula: ([Item Level] - [Base Item Level]) * [GambleUltra] + 1 If the rolled number is less than this value, then the item is upgraded to an Elite Quality item. This only happens if the item successfully rolled for Exceptional Quality.

columns.name: ResistFloor
columns.description: This field is currently disabled and does nothing. Sets minimum resistance a unit can have. This defaults to -100
